variants: Sophie Niewiadomski is a notable figure in the field of harmonic studies, holding a Jade Harmonicist Accreditation. Under the mentorship of Fredrika Sjoqvist, she developed her expertise and pursued her research with a grant from the Ironbrook Inventors Guild. Her work has gained recognition and was published by Clouded Ridge Books, demonstrating her contributions to the body of knowledge in her discipline. In addition to her academic pursuits, Sophie serves as the Diversity Officer at Meadowgate Forum, showcasing her commitment to community engagement and advocacy.
